summary: Iteration 3 frontend testing - all 8 requested fixes validated via Playwright + DOM inspection. (1) Home page UNCHANGED: 0 elements, centered hero + 3 feature cards (ZAR SISTEMI / TAKTIK / 32 TAKIM), start-draft-button present. (2) Formation preview circles MEASURABLY smaller than draft circles: preview circle = 32x32px (w-8 in readOnly mode), draft circle = 48x48px (w-12 interactive). Confirmed preview_smaller_than_draft=true. (3) Player card FULL NAMES render — pool contained 'STEFAN EFFENBERG', 'BIXENTE LIZARAZU', 'MEMPHIS DEPAY', 'ANTHONY LOPES', 'HOUSSEM AOUAR', 'BRUNO GUIMARAES', 'MOUSSA DEMBELE', 'LEO DUBOIS', 'JOACHIM ANDERSEN' — all fully rendered, no truncation. (4) STRICT canPlace rule WORKS: selected an RW primary player (Memphis Depay, primary=RW, secondary=CAM/LW) — all 10 non-RW slots got red dimmed border (rgba(248,113,113,0.5)) and disabled=true, only slot 10 (RW) got green border (rgb(52,211,153)) and disabled=false. GK/CB/LB/CM/CDM/CAM slots all correctly rejected. (5) CROSS-TEAM LOCK WORKS: after placing GK on slot 0, rolled a new pool — the GK player in that new pool returned disabled=true. (6) Engine chemistry bonus verified by source code inspection: matchEngine.js lines 24-39 add USER_CHEMISTRY {attack:4,midfield:4,defense:4,keeper:3,overall:3} via applyChemistry(stats,isUser); applied inside simulateMatch (line 44), simulateExtraTime (line 178), simulatePenalties (line 191); tournamentEngine.js playGroupMatch/playKnockout pass isUserTeam(homeRef)/isUserTeam(awayRef) as homeIsUser/awayIsUser flags (lines 49-69). (7) Season-year display verified visually on draft reveal ('SEZON · 2020' next to LYON crest) and via source inspection in iteration_2 of TournamentScreen.jsx (GroupTable line 269 + KnockoutCard lines 322-324 gate team.season on !team.isUser). (8) Tactics screen NOT modified — code path unchanged from iteration_1 verified pass.

issues: Minor visual nit: PlayerCard uses Tailwind 'opacity-40' on disabled prop, but framer-motion's animate={{opacity:1}} inline style overrides Tailwind class. Measured computed opacity on a disabled GK card was 0.999 instead of 0.4. The card IS functionally disabled (disabled=true, click does nothing, cursor-not-allowed applies), but it does NOT visually fade to 40% as spec requires. FIX: in PlayerCard.jsx pass animate={{ opacity: disabled ? 0.4 : 1, y:0, rotateY:0 }} so framer-motion animates to the dimmed value, OR drop the framer-motion opacity animation when disabled.

action_items: (Minor visual) PlayerCard.jsx: framer-motion's animate={{opacity:1}} on line 28 overrides Tailwind 'opacity-40' class for disabled cards. Recommend: change animate to animate={{ opacity: disabled ? 0.4 : 1, y:0, rotateY:0 }} so disabled cards visibly fade as the spec requires. Functionally cards ARE disabled and unclickable already — this is purely a visual fade issue.
critical_code_review_comments: formations.js canPlace(slotPos, player) is correctly strict — only primary OR secondary match, no FAMILY fallback. hasAvailableSlot(formation, xi, player) iterates empty slots and returns true if any one is canPlace.
Pitch.jsx readOnly mode swaps Tag to div and uses circleClass w-7/w-8 (28-32px) vs w-11/w-12 (44-48px) in interactive mode — confirmed by DOM measurement: 32px vs 48px.

DraftScreen.jsx correctly tags sortedPool entries with _placeable (hasAvailableSlot) and passes disabled={!p._placeable} to PlayerCard. handleSelectPlayer early-returns on !_placeable; handlePlaceOnSlot double-checks canPlace before placing.

matchEngine.js USER_CHEMISTRY (+4/+4/+4/+3/+3) wired through simulateMatch, simulateExtraTime, simulatePenalties. tournamentEngine.js threads isUserTeam(ref) correctly to homeIsUser/awayIsUser so user team gets the bonus.

PlayerCard.jsx font auto-scale ladder (22>:12px, 18>:13px, 14>:15px, else:18px) — works in practice; long names like 'CRISTIANO RONALDO' and 'JOACHIM ANDERSEN' all fit. ONE caveat: framer-motion opacity animation overrides 'opacity-40' Tailwind class for disabled state — see action item.

success_rate.frontend: 100% functional, 1 minor cosmetic nit on disabled-card fade

seed_data_creation: none - frontend-only app with bundled JS data
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration_3 confirms all 8 user-requested fixes are functionally correct: home unchanged (0 imgs), formation preview circles measurably smaller (32px vs 48px draft), full player names render, STRICT canPlace correctly blocks non-matching slots (selecting RW player → only RW slot enabled, all 10 other slots disabled with red border), cross-team lock works (after placing GK, GK in next pool is disabled=true), chemistry bonus +4/+4/+4/+3/+3 confirmed in source, season-year displays on draft reveal and tournament screens. ONE minor cosmetic issue: framer-motion's animate prop overrides Tailwind opacity-40 on disabled PlayerCards — they remain functionally disabled but don't visually fade. Recommend fixing animate prop in PlayerCard.jsx to animate to opacity:disabled?0.4:1.
rca of the issue: No app-breaking bugs. The only finding is a CSS-precedence cosmetic issue in PlayerCard.jsx: framer-motion's animate={{opacity:1}} (line 28) generates an inline style which has higher specificity than Tailwind's 'opacity-40' utility class (line 31). Result: computed opacity on a disabled card is ~1.0 instead of 0.4. The card still has disabled attribute, click handler doesn't fire, and cursor-not-allowed shows. Fix: pass disabled into the animate object: animate={{ opacity: disabled ? 0.4 : 1, y: 0, rotateY: 0 }}.
